message:
feat(evidence,observability): expand with filtering, queries, and metrics

Evidence module (was 3 API fns, now 10):
- is_warning, is_pass: level predicate queries
- count_by_level: count entries at a specific level
- count_for_source: count entries matching a source prefix
- first_failure: get the first failure entry for diagnostics
- has_entity: check if any entries reference a specific entity
- verdict_str: human-readable verdict string

Observability module (was 1 API fn, now 13):
- Metrics system: counter/gauge/histogram with register, increment,
  set, observe, get, count
- Task inspector: query task state details
- Resource accounting: capture region/task/obligation utilization

These close the depth gap with upstream evidence.rs (16 pub fns)
and begin addressing observability/ (232 pub fns, 14k LOC).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
